arts.ttl: Glasner reveals most pleasing part of win over Villa
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner hailed Crystal Palace’s ‘brilliant’ win over Aston Villa – whilst revealing what pleased him most from the 4-1 victory.

arts.ttl: Hits & misses: Palmer stuck in a rut as Villa's poor away form deepens
arts.sum: "All the big players go through bad moments where they struggle to score," said the Chelsea boss after the game. The 22-year-old has not managed to score a goal for seven games.

arts.ttl: 'The mood is buzzing, the music is bouncing' - Palace get their rewards
arts.sum: After a slow start to the season, Crystal Palace have turned a corner with a thrashing of Aston Villa the latest sign they are on the up.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals Aston Villa recovery plan after getting 'progressively worse' against Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Unai Emery reveals Aston Villa recovery plan after getting 'progressively worse' against Crystal Palace Aston Villa manager Unai Emery gave his verdict after the 4-1 defeat at Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford transfer stance emerges as Aston Villa learn Man Utd 'guarantee'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has hit the ground running during his loan spell at Aston Villa, but former Manchester United goalkeeper Ben Foster does not believe the forward will join Arsenal. "Even if Marcus Rashford kicks off massively, Manchester United would never, ever, ever send him to Arsenal, never in a million years.

arts.ttl: Why Emi Martinez was taken off at half-time as Unai Emery provides injury update
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has confirmed Emi Martinez was taken off in the 4-1 defeat at Crystal Palace because he was feeling some pain. Emi Martinez came off at half-time in Aston Villa's defeat at Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: ‘A nice moment’: Nketiah delighted with first league goal for Palace
arts.sum: Eddie Nketiah was delighted to cap Crystal Palace’s dominant display against Aston Villa with his first Premier League goal for the club.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace face Marc Guehi injury concern after Aston Villa rout
arts.sum: The England defender played the full 90 minutes but manager Oliver Glasner revealed he ‘felt pain in his knee’.

arts.ttl: Glasner praises Palace's 'great performance' and 'fantastic goals'
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner praises his side's "great performance" following their 4-1 win over Aston Villa which included two goals from Ismaila Sarr.

arts.ttl: Emery 'disappointed' but Villa must remain motivated
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery says he is "disappointed" by the 4-1 defeat at Crystal Palace, and that they must stay motivated for their upcoming FA Cup and Champions League fixtures.
